title: Data & privacy
subtitle: Request an export of your data, or delete your account. All requests are logged for audit.

export.heading: Export my data
export.body: We'll collect your profile, applications, bookings, and notifications into a JSON file and email you a secure download link. It expires in 14 days.
export.pending: An export is already in progress. You'll get an email when it's ready.

delete.heading: Delete my account
delete.body: Your account is scheduled for deletion after a 30-day cooling-off window. You can cancel any time during that window by returning to this page.
delete.warning: This cannot be undone after the cooling-off window expires.
